selections.name: The Pretty Sister
selections.reason: Finished 2nd in the key race on Jan 19, finishing ahead of the favorite. Consistent speed figures (97).

selections.name: About To Set Sail
selections.reason: Morning line favorite. Had a wide trip last time finishing 4th behind top pick. Capable of rebounding.

selections.name: Sacred Saint
selections.reason: Finished just behind the top two selections in the common race. Solid contender for the exotics.

selections.name: Mika Ella Pika
selections.reason: Has high speed potential but finished further back in the common race. Dangerous if she finds early lead.

danger_horse.name: About To Set Sail
danger_horse.reason: Speedy favorite who had a troubled wide trip last start; could easily reverse form.

selections.name: Show Time
selections.reason: Defeated the favorite (#1) last time out at this track/distance. Offers value at 7/2.

selections.name: Disco Ball
selections.reason: Huge speed figures (110). Finished 2nd to top pick last time but has massive back class.

selections.name: Guanare
selections.reason: Finished 3rd behind the top two selections last start. Consistent check earner.

selections.name: Get Her Number
selections.reason: Classy veteran returning from a layoff. Won a starter allowance at RP in December.

danger_horse.name: Disco Ball
danger_horse.reason: Highest speed figures in the field; if he runs his best, he wins.

selections.name: Nova Nova Nova
selections.reason: Strong 2nd place finish on turf last time out. The clear form choice.

selections.name: Clearly My Star
selections.reason: Finished 3rd behind the top pick last time. Consistent turf performer.

selections.name: All Star Tout
selections.reason: Has shown ability on turf previously. Should improve off recent effort.

selections.name: Provoker
selections.reason: Ran well on wet track at Delta; tries turf here.

danger_horse.name: Clearly My Star
danger_horse.reason: Finished close to top pick last time; logical alternative.

selections.name: Runninginthemoney
selections.reason: Standout. Won 3 of last 4 starts convincingly. The horse to beat.

selections.name: Into Wishing
selections.reason: Coming off a win at Delta. In good form.

selections.name: American Dollars
selections.reason: Consistent placer. Should be in the mix for minor awards.

selections.name: Totally Addicted
selections.reason: Can pick up pieces if pace collapses, but form is below top pick.

selections.name: La Reynita
selections.reason: Consistent form at this level. Good draw for a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Saint Nancy S
selections.reason: Won last start on synthetic at Turfway. Form should transfer well.

selections.name: Mambo Queen
selections.reason: Drops in class? Back class is strong despite poor last effort.

selections.name: Storms Of Life
selections.reason: Returning from layoff but has back class.

danger_horse.name: Saint Nancy S
danger_horse.reason: Coming off a win and fits well here.

selections.name: Double Edge Sword
selections.reason: Won last start at this track. Speed figure (89) is competitive.

selections.name: Charco
selections.reason: Also a last-out winner at Fair Grounds. Strong speed figure (88).

selections.name: Rocketeightyeight
selections.reason: Won last out at Delta. Good current form.

selections.name: Runnin Munnin
selections.reason: 2nd last time out. Consistent runner.

danger_horse.name: Charco
danger_horse.reason: In peak form and draws well.

selections.name: Start Out
selections.reason: First-time starter for Brad Cox/Pedroza. Dangerous connections.

selections.name: Tan Chulo
selections.reason: Finished 2nd in debut on turf. Experience edge.

selections.name: Razorcat
selections.reason: 3rd last time out. Consistent maiden form.

selections.name: Ice Wolf
selections.reason: Finished 5th last time but wasn't beaten far. Can improve.

selections.name: Hay Jude
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last time with a strong 95 speed figure. In good form.

selections.name: Benji Star
selections.reason: Consistent type. 3rd last time out. Always in the mix.

selections.name: Smash It
selections.reason: Drops in class? Speed figures suggest he fits here.

selections.name: Bron And Brow
selections.reason: Capable on his day, though last effort was average.
